developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! We are a month out from releasing Cozy Worlds in Early Access. We've worked hard to expand one what people have enjoyed in the demo, and we've got some big plans for 2026! I hope you will check out the release in November :)

reviews.review_title: A cozy game with a cozy feel
reviews.review_description:
This game is adorable. From the animal(s) below, to the clouds above. I spent a solid two hours just creating and contemplating in my room. I was able to have a creative process, and still be able to think at the same time. If you have ADHD, here’s a cure. 

I honestly cannot wait to see where this game goes. It’s already in an amazing state, and I love the way the ui and music and game all interact with each other. The game itself is relatively simple, and there’s not much of a tutorial. 

I think this game needs a discord :P

developer_response.body:
Hi. Thank you for the review! We are very happy to hear you enjoyed the experience. FYI, we are launching the Early Access version of Cozy Worlds this week :) We'd love for you to try out this latest version and tell us what you think.

We are discussing whether we will create a dedicated Discord for the game. For now, you can join us on our general VRTogether Discord: https://discord.gg/CUqkNXP4VD

reviews.review_description: I love this game has SO much potential and probably will become a very popular game i very much recommend you play this

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! I am glad you enjoyed the Cozy Worlds demo! I am working hard on finishing up a big demo update to roll out alongside the early access app launch for the game. Stay tuned :)

reviews.review_description:
This is one of the coziest and most mindful VR experiences I’ve come across. Whether you're crafting a peaceful world in VR or designing your surroundings in MR, every moment feels like a gentle escape. You choose where to place lakes, bridges, trees, clouds—even animals—and slowly build your own little haven.

The ambient music and calming visuals work together beautifully, making it not just a game but a space to unwind and breathe. I especially appreciated the thoughtful message from the developer, Richard—simple, heartfelt words that perfectly capture the spirit of the experience.

If you’re looking for something peaceful, creative, and meaningful, this is a must-try. Thank you for bringing another beautifully crafted game to the VR space. 🌤️
Stumbled across this and gave it a shot. So cool to build a little forest in your living room….very clever. Thanks!

developer_response.body: Thanks for leaving a review! Glad you enjoyed it. Over the next few months, I'll be adding updates to the game demo as I prepare for an early access release. Stay tuned to see some cool new features I'll be adding to the game :)

reviews.review_description: I can’t wait till the full version comes out! Very relaxing!

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review! I hadn't responded until now because I had not realized some folks had left reviews :) I've got some exciting plans for the game I look forward to sharing!
